overview: Mummy is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern, Inferno, Ruins, Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 120 HP, 20 physical damage, 130 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 2, MaxImpactEndurance 5. Has a Staggered reaction in its ability set. 14 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack5 Short at 240% ratio (480 base damage). Sight range 1500, combat radius 100. Nightmare gains 7 exclusive abilityies: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare, Attack4 Nightmare, Attack5 Nightmare Short, Attack5 Nightmare Middle, Attack5 Nightmare Long.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 14 melee attacks. Attack1 (170%), Attack2 (170%), Attack3 (170%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Paralyze Nightmare
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Paralyze Nightmare icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Has Stagger Reaction (ImpactRes 2, Endurance 5)
strategies.description: This monster has a Staggered ability in its ability set, meaning it has a stagger reaction animation. ImpactResistance: 2, MaxImpactEndurance: 5.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-3000), Divine (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Attack5 Short (240% ratio)
strategies.description: Attack5 Short deals 480 damage at base (240% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare, Attack4 Nightmare, Attack5 Nightmare Short, Attack5 Nightmare Middle, Attack5 Nightmare Long
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 7 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare, Attack4 Nightmare, Attack5 Nightmare Short, Attack5 Nightmare Middle, Attack5 Nightmare Long. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1500 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1500 units, loses target at 2000 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 100, ability check distance 160
strategies.description: Combat area radius 100. Ability check distance 160.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 700 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 7 exclusive abilities: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare, Attack4 Nightmare, Attack5 Nightmare Short, Attack5 Nightmare Middle, Attack5 Nightmare Long

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1500 units. Loses target at 2000 units.
